query:
SELECT pr.id, pr.gestanteId, g.nome, pr.dataParto, pr.tipoParto, pr.createdAt
FROM partosRealizados pr
JOIN gestantes g ON pr.gestanteId = g.id
WHERE pr.gestanteId IN (330021, 330022)
ORDER BY pr.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT pr.id, pr.gestanteId, g.nome, pr.dataParto, pr.tipoParto, pr.createdAt
